subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The letter thou didst address to Jináb-i-Mírzá 'Abdu'l-Vahháb was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی نامه ای که بجناب میرزا عبدالوهاب مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @smoking, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
